assertions.evidence: Debug report requires run IDs, commit SHA, runner image, browser version, cache key, UTC/local timestamps, TZ, seed, shard count, latency, and Monday cron jobs.
Provides a ranked hypothesis table with date/timezone boundary first, scheduled cleanup second, CI refresh third, external auth slowness fourth.
Specifies one-variable tests that would disconfirm generic CI slowness, browser-version causes, and external auth slowness before changing timeouts.
Correctly refuses to invent a root cause from the prompt alone; it defines required evidence but does not provide an actual proven root cause.
